title: 444 advertisement FAKE
wikitext:
[]: 4.44 advertisement [FAKE] Post by tootiredtoriot » Tue Jun 13, 2017 7:05 pm On a website and this 4.44 advertisement video is embedded. No sound, no picture movement, just 10 secs of this 4.44 image. Anyone else come across this or have any ideas? SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 4.44 advertisement Post by Sachi » Tue Jun 13, 2017 7:26 pm Unless it's from an credible source, don't trust what you see. A good way to double check is to check the official Eva site. Either way, the official title for the final film as going to be 3.0+1.0 instead of 4.44: http://www.evangelion.co.jp/

[]: Re: 4.44 advertisement Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 13, 2017 9:02 pm Definitely fake. Locking thread.
